headline: Oil Shock, Stagflation Fears, and a Bright Spot in AI — Wall Street Ends the Week in the Red
summary: Surging crude prices driven by the war in Iran, a deeply disappointing jobs report, and rising stagflation anxiety sent Wall Street sharply lower on Friday. But not everything was gloomy, Marvell Technology delivered an earnings beat that reminded investors AI infrastructure demand is very much alive.

headline: Is Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) Pricing Reflect DCF Upside After Recent Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings is priced attractively today, this breakdown will help you make sense of what the current share price might be implying. The stock last closed at US$20.05, with recent returns showing a 19.1% decline over 7 days, a 14.0% decline over 30 days, a 12.0% decline year to date, flat performance over 1 year, a 42.6% gain over 3 years, and a 34.8% decline over 5 years. Recent news coverage has focused on how cruise operators are balancing...
